product_overview: Operator UI for the NUP pipeline. Pure UI layer — talks to the backend over HTTP, never touches the DB. Built on aiogram 3 with the Trigger → Code → Answer widget pattern.

general_info.name: Welcome and main menu
general_info.overview: /start command shows a welcome screen with the list of available commands.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Give a quick entrypoint so operator immediately knows what the bot can do.
goal_and_context.user_problem: Operator opened a chat with the bot and needs to discover commands.

business_rules.description: /start always clears the FSM state of the user.

acceptance_criteria.user_story: As an operator, I want a welcome message when I send /start so that I know which commands exist.

bdd.given: User has just opened the chat with the bot
bdd.then: Bot replies once with a welcome text containing 'NUP Pipeline Bot' and the /render_status command
and_postconditions: FSM state of the user is cleared

non_functional_requirements.description: Welcome reply arrives within 1 second of /start (no backend calls).

test_cases.assertion: message.answer awaited once with text containing 'NUP Pipeline Bot'; state.clear awaited once

general_info.name: Render job status
general_info.overview: /render_status <uuid> queries the backend and shows the render job state and output URI.

goal_and_context.business_goal: Operator can monitor video renders without opening DB or curl.
goal_and_context.user_problem: After triggering a render, operator wants to know if it succeeded.

business_rules.description: Argument must be a valid UUID; otherwise the bot rejects without calling backend.
Backend 404 is mapped to a clear 'не найден' answer (not a Python traceback).

acceptance_criteria.user_story: As an operator, I want to see the status and output URI of a known render so that I can share the link.

bdd.given: Backend has render X with status=succeeded and output_uri=Y
bdd.then: Bot replies with a message containing 'succeeded' and Y

acceptance_criteria.user_story: As an operator, I want a clear error when the render does not exist so that I can correct my id.

bdd.given: Backend returns 404 for the given id
bdd.then: Bot replies with a message containing 'не найден'

acceptance_criteria.user_story: As an operator, I want a clear error when I type a non-UUID so that I correct my input without spamming the backend.

bdd.then: Bot replies with a message mentioning 'UUID' AND the backend is not called

test_cases.setup: Patch RendersAPI inside render_status_code so .get returns a succeeded job dict
test_cases.assertion: message.answer awaited once with text containing 'succeeded' and the output_uri
message.answer awaited once with text containing 'не найден'

test_cases.setup: Patch RendersAPI .get is a Mock; argument is 'not-a-uuid'
test_cases.assertion: message.answer awaited once with text containing 'UUID'; .get NOT awaited
